name: AS5600 12-Bit Magnetic Position Sensor
description: The `as5600` sensor platform you to use your AS5600 ([datasheet](https://ams.com/documents/20143/36005/AS5600_DS000365_5-00.pdf/649ee61c-8f9a-20df-9e10-43173a3eb323), [AMS](https://ams.com/en/as5600)) or AS5600L ([datasheet](https://ams.com/documents/20143/36005/AS5600L_DS000545_3-00.pdf/7ade6878-7a32-2294-b88d-479d50fab6de), [AMS](https://ams.com/en/as5600l)) 12-bit magnetic position sensor with ESPHome. Individual sensors will be added using the [AS5600 Sensor Platform](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/as5600#sensor). To use this hub, first setup the [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) and connect the sensor to the pins specified there.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The i²c address of the sensor. See [I²C Addresses](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/as5600#as5600_i2c_addresses) for more information.

config_entries.label: Dir Pin
config_entries.description: The pin connected to the AS5600's direction pin. See [Direction](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/as5600#direction) for more information.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: End Position
config_entries.description:
**Set at most one of:** `end_position`, `range`.

The raw position that should be considered the end (e.g. 180deg) of the allowable rotation range. Mutually exclusive with **range**. See [Position / Range](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/as5600#as5600_position_range).

config_entries.label: Range
config_entries.description:
**Set at most one of:** `end_position`, `range`.

The allowable rotation range from the **start_position**. Mutually exclusive with **end_position**. See [Position / Range](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/as5600#as5600_position_range).

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for this AS5600 Hub.

config_entries.label: Direction
config_entries.description: The direction that the magnet should rotate to increase values. Used in combination with the **dir_pin**.

config_entries.label: Power Mode
config_entries.description: The power mode to run the sensor. Note: When **watchdog** is enabled, it will switch the device to `low3` when there is not much change in position.

config_entries.label: Start Position
config_entries.description: The raw position that should be considered the start (i.e. `0`  ). See [Position / Range](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/as5600#as5600_position_range).

config_entries.label: Watchdog
config_entries.description: Whether to enable the watchdog that puts the chip into low power mode 3. Check the datasheet for more information. Defaults to `off`.
